author: sleepyhauru
description: Upload Discord custom emojis from allowed image URLs and copy custom emojis from other servers. Includes hybrid commands, message context menus, duplicate-name suffixing, and a per-guild upload allowlist.
install_msg: Load it with `[p]load remoji`. Use `[p]remoji upload <url> <name>`, `[p]remoji copy <emoji> [name]`, and `[p]remoji copymany <emojis...>`. You can also reply to a message with `[p]remoji copy`, `[p]remoji copymany`, or `[p]remoji url`. To enable slash and message context commands, run `[p]slash enablecog remoji` and `[p]slash sync`. Use `[p]remojiset allowuser <user>` to allow uploads without Manage Emojis.
short: Upload and copy custom Discord emojis.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any user data.
